Title: Mediterranean Tomato Landraces Exhibit Genotype-Specific Transcriptomic Responses to Water Stress.
Summary: This study compares the transcriptomic responses of four tomato genotypes (two Mediterranean landraces and two commercial varieties) under well-watered and water stress conditions using RNA sequencing in leaf and root tissues. The analysis reveals that drought tolerance strategies are genotype-dependent, with landraces exhibiting targeted stress-related pathway activation compared to the broader metabolic impairment response of commercial varieties.
